membership_no.text: เลขทะเบียน

root.sql: select pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as membername , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no) as groupname , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth , '!date_of_birth_1!' as date_of_birth_1 , '!date_of_birth_2!' as date_of_birth_2 , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sysdate) as sys_date , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_status.member_status_name from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_status where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_status.member_status_code and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = '01' --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth between '01/10/1961' and '02/10/1962' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
